active_plan: Completed: inspected Tauri metadata, scripts, Settings, bridge, report preview, and snapshot data flow.
Completed: implemented v0.4 metadata, About diagnostics, and Demo Mode.
Completed: added release documentation and smoke checklist.
Completed: ran verification and recorded packaging limitation.
next_3_steps: Re-run cd app && npm run package on a network-stable release machine to produce NSIS/MSI installers.
Run docs/smoke-test.md against an installed build.
Prepare GitHub Release notes from CHANGELOG.md.

validation.last_result: Build, tests, sidecar build, JSON validation, diff check, and harness file-presence check passed. Packaging built the release exe but installer bundling failed on Tauri NSIS helper download timeout.
known_failures: Windows installers will be unsigned unless signing credentials are supplied outside the repository.
Interactive notification/tray smoke testing requires a desktop runtime session.
npm run package failed to produce NSIS/MSI installers because downloading nsis_tauri_utils.dll timed out; release exe exists at app/src-tauri/target/release/signalforge-daily.exe.

handoff.last_summary: Completed v0.4 Packaging & Release readiness implementation; installer bundling needs retry on a network-stable release machine.
handoff.resume_from: Re-run npm run package to produce NSIS/MSI installers, then perform the manual smoke checklist.
